daily_image.alt: A loving family photo for Meme

prayer.title: Morning Offering
prayer.text: O Jesus, through the Immaculate Heart of Mary, I offer You my prayers, works, joys, and sufferings of this day for all the intentions of Your Sacred Heart, in union with the Holy Sacrifice of the Mass throughout the world. Amen.
prayer.source: Traditional Catholic morning prayer; see USCCB Morning Offering

thought.headline: Mary is praying with you.
thought.body: When words are hard, let the Blessed Mother carry the prayer. A simple Hail Mary can be a soft place for the heart to rest.
thought.verse: Blessed are you who believed. — Luke 1:45

blessing: May Christ the Divine Physician bring healing, patience, and hope.
practice: Let gratitude be small today: name one person, one comfort, one grace.

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
